name: IndieCollab
description: IndieCollab is a collaboration platform for indie game developers. It connects developers, pixel artists, sound designers and creators to find teammates, post projects, hunt bug bounties, and ship games together.

skills.name: Project Collaboration
skills.description: Post and discover indie game projects seeking collaborators

skills.name: Talent Hub
skills.description: Find and match with indie game developers by skill and role

skills.name: Game Jam
skills.description: Organize and participate in game jam competitions

skills.name: Bug Bounty
skills.description: Report and resolve bugs in indie game projects for rewards
